instruction: Fix the color of the green status dot on this award icon — it's the wrong shade (slightly-darker black).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/award.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="8" r="7"/><polyline points="8.21 13.89 7 23 12 20 17 23 15.79 13.88"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#212121" cx="24" cy="104" r="5" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/award.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="8" r="7"/><polyline points="8.21 13.89 7 23 12 20 17 23 15.79 13.88"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#22c55e" cx="24" cy="104" r="5" />
</svg>
